mutations.source:
+fn draw_duck ()->String [io,async]
  +let cmd:String = concat("convert -size 400x400 xc:skyblue ", concat("-fill yellow -draw \"ellipse 200,250 80,100 0,360\" ", concat("-fill yellow -draw \"ellipse 200,150 60,80 0,360\" ", concat("-fill orange -draw \"polygon 140,140 120,150 140,160\" ", concat("-fill black -draw \"circle 180,130 180,135\" ", concat("-fill black -draw \"circle 220,130 220,135\" ", "duck.png"))))))
  +await result:String = shell_exec(cmd)
  +return concat("Duck drawn! Result: ", result)

!eval draw_duck

mutations.source:
+type Expr = Num(Float) | Add(Expr, Expr) | Sub(Expr, Expr) | Mul(Expr, Expr) | Div(Expr, Expr)

+fn parse_expr (input:String)->Result<Expr> [fail]
  +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
  +check not_empty trimmed.len>0 ~err_empty_input
  +if contains(trimmed, "+")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Add(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "-")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "*")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "/")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +else
    +let num:Int = to_int(trimmed)
    +let float_val:Float = num
    +return Num(float_val)

+fn eval_calc (expr:Expr)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +match expr
  +case Num(val)
    +return val
  +case Add(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l + r
  +case Sub(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l - r
  +case Mul(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l * r
  +case Div(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +check not_zero r != 0.0 ~err_division_by_zero
    +return l / r

+fn calculator ()->String [io,async]
  +await dummy1:String = println("=== Simple Calculator ===")
  +await dummy2:String = println("Enter expressions like: 5+3, 10*2, 8/2")
  +await dummy3:String = println("Type 'quit' to exit")
  +await dummy4:String = println("")
  +let running:Bool = true
  +while running
    +await input:String = read_line("> ")
    +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
    +if trimmed == "quit"
      +set running = false
      +await bye:String = println("Goodbye!")
    +else
      +call result:Result<Expr> = parse_expr(trimmed)
      +if result.is_ok
        +let expr:Expr = result.unwrap
        +call eval_result:Result<Float> = eval_calc(expr)
        +if eval_result.is_ok
          +let answer:Float = eval_result.unwrap
          +let answer_str:String = to_string(answer)
          +let msg:String = concat("= ", answer_str)
          +await show:String = println(msg)
        +else
          +await err:String = println("Error: division by zero")
      +else
        +await err:String = println("Error: invalid expression")
  +return "done"

!eval calculator
mutations.summary: OK: added type `Expr`; OK: added function `parse_expr` (1 params, 3 statements, effects: [Fail]); OK: added function `eval_calc` (1 params, 1 statements, effects: [Fail]); OK: added function `calculator` (0 params, 7 statements, effects: [Io, Async])

+fn calc (input:String)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +call expr:Expr = parse_expr(input)
  +call result:Float = eval_calc(expr)
  +return result

!test calc
  +with "5+3" -> expect Ok
  +with "10*2" -> expect Ok
  +with "8/2" -> expect Ok
  +with "10-3" -> expect Ok

!eval calc "5+3"

!replace parse_expr
  +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
  +check not_empty trimmed.len > 0 ~err_empty_input
  +if starts_with(trimmed, "(")
    +let closing:Int = index_of(trimmed, ")")
    +check has_closing closing >= 0 ~err_unmatched_paren
    +let inner:String = substring(trimmed, 1, closing)
    +call inner_expr:Expr = parse_expr(inner)
    +let rest:String = substring(trimmed, closing + 1, trimmed.len)
    +if rest.len == 0
      +return inner_expr
    +let rest_trimmed:String = trim(rest)
    +let first_char:String = char_at(rest_trimmed, 0)
    +if first_char == "+"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Add(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "-"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Sub(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "*"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Mul(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "/"
      +let right_part:String = substring(rest_trimmed, 1, rest_trimmed.len)
      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Div(inner_expr, right)
    +else
      +check valid_continuation false ~err_invalid_after_paren
      +return inner_expr
  +let plus_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
  +let minus_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
  +let mul_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
  +let div_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")
  +if plus_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, plus_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, plus_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Add(left, right)
  +if minus_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, minus_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, minus_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +if mul_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, mul_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, mul_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +if div_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, div_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, div_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +call num:Float = to_float(trimmed)
  +return Num(num)

!test calc
  +with "(2+3)*4" -> expect Ok(20.0)
  +with "2+(3*4)" -> expect Ok(14.0)
  +with "(10-5)/5" -> expect Ok(1.0)
  +with "((2+3)*4)" -> expect Ok(20.0)

+fn draw_duck ()->String [io,async]
  +let cmd:String = concat("convert -size 400x400 xc:skyblue ", concat("-fill yellow -draw \"ellipse 200,250 80,100 0,360\" ", concat("-fill yellow -draw \"ellipse 200,150 60,80 0,360\" ", concat("-fill orange -draw \"polygon 140,140 120,150 140,160\" ", concat("-fill black -draw \"circle 180,130 180,135\" ", concat("-fill black -draw \"circle 220,130 220,135\" ", "duck.png"))))))
  +await result:String = shell_exec(cmd)
  +return concat("Duck drawn! Result: ", result)

!eval draw_duck

+type Expr = Num(Float) | Add(Expr, Expr) | Sub(Expr, Expr) | Mul(Expr, Expr) | Div(Expr, Expr)

+fn parse_expr (input:String)->Result<Expr> [fail]
  +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
  +check not_empty trimmed.len>0 ~err_empty_input
  +if contains(trimmed, "+")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Add(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "-")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "*")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +elif contains(trimmed, "/")
    +let idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, idx+1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +else
    +let num:Int = to_int(trimmed)
    +let float_val:Float = num
    +return Num(float_val)

+fn eval_calc (expr:Expr)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +match expr
  +case Num(val)
    +return val
  +case Add(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l + r
  +case Sub(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l - r
  +case Mul(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +return l * r
  +case Div(left, right)
    +call l:Float = eval_calc(left)
    +call r:Float = eval_calc(right)
    +check not_zero r != 0.0 ~err_division_by_zero
    +return l / r

+fn calculator ()->String [io,async]
  +await dummy1:String = println("=== Simple Calculator ===")
  +await dummy2:String = println("Enter expressions like: 5+3, 10*2, 8/2")
  +await dummy3:String = println("Type 'quit' to exit")
  +await dummy4:String = println("")
  +let running:Bool = true
  +while running
    +await input:String = read_line("> ")
    +let trimmed:String = trim(input)
    +if trimmed == "quit"
      +set running = false
      +await bye:String = println("Goodbye!")
    +else
      +call result:Result<Expr> = parse_expr(trimmed)
      +if result.is_ok
        +let expr:Expr = result.unwrap
        +call eval_result:Result<Float> = eval_calc(expr)
        +if eval_result.is_ok
          +let answer:Float = eval_result.unwrap
          +let answer_str:String = to_string(answer)
          +let msg:String = concat("= ", answer_str)
          +await show:String = println(msg)
        +else
          +await err:String = println("Error: division by zero")
      +else
        +await err:String = println("Error: invalid expression")
  +return "done"

!eval calculator

+fn calc (input:String)->Result<Float> [fail]
  +call expr:Expr = parse_expr(input)
  +call result:Float = eval_calc(expr)
  +return result

!test calc
  +with "5+3" -> expect Ok
  +with "10*2" -> expect Ok
  +with "8/2" -> expect Ok
  +with "10-3" -> expect Ok

!eval calc "5+3"

  +check not_empty trimmed.len > 0 ~err_empty_input

    +let closing:Int = index_of(trimmed, ")")
    +check has_closing closing >= 0 ~err_unmatched_paren

    +call inner_expr:Expr = parse_expr(inner)
    +let rest:String = substring(trimmed, closing + 1, trimmed.len)
    +if rest.len == 0
      +return inner_expr
    +let rest_trimmed:String = trim(rest)
    +let first_char:String = char_at(rest_trimmed, 0)
    +if first_char == "+"

      +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_part)
      +return Add(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "-"

      +return Sub(inner_expr, right)
    +elif first_char == "*"

    +elif first_char == "/"

      +return inner_expr
  +let plus_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "+")
  +let minus_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "-")
  +let mul_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "*")
  +let div_idx:Int = index_of(trimmed, "/")

    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, plus_idx + 1, trimmed.len)

    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Sub(left, right)
  +if mul_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, mul_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, mul_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Mul(left, right)
  +if div_idx > 0
    +let left_str:String = substring(trimmed, 0, div_idx)
    +let right_str:String = substring(trimmed, div_idx + 1, trimmed.len)
    +call left:Expr = parse_expr(left_str)
    +call right:Expr = parse_expr(right_str)
    +return Div(left, right)
  +call num:Float = to_float(trimmed)
  +return Num(num)

!test calc
  +with "(2+3)*4" -> expect Ok(20.0)
  +with "2+(3*4)" -> expect Ok(14.0)
  +with "(10-5)/5" -> expect Ok(1.0)
  +with "((2+3)*4)" -> expect Ok(20.0)
